resources.string: Almost there! Please enable storage permission to easily manage your phone files via the web.
Please allow “Display over other apps” so you don’t miss important system pop-ups like uninstall confirmations when the app runs in the background.
Choose which apps can send notifications to PC
Choose between allowlist (only selected apps) or blacklist (exclude selected apps) mode

PlainApp uses this accessibility service to enable remote control during screen mirroring. It injects touch events (tap, swipe, scroll) and navigation actions (Back, Home, Recents) sent from the web interface.
The app needs permission to access your device storage.
The app needs permission to read your SMS.
The app needs permission to read your Contacts.
The app needs permission to read your Calls.
To view media controls in the notifications center, kindly grant permission to receive push notifications from the app.
Please allow this app to run in the background and show notifications to provide essential functionality or services.
In order to make phone calls through the app, please allow phone access.
